findings: Strong distributional shift in Destination Port between BENIGN and DDoS classes confirmed by high Jensen-Shannon divergence (0.7315).
Near-deterministic mapping of Destination Port values to class labels indicated by zero entropy and dominant ratio of 1.0 in DDoS class.
Local consistency checks show high label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts, reinforcing abrupt distributional shifts.
limitations: Analysis limited to local evidence within e33; no global aggregation performed.
